text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
So... my d-d-debut is finally here. I'm a little
nervous, but...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
choice_data_list: You're fired up all of a sudden.
You're fired up all of a sudden.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Well, it all started after the three of us went to
the Derby. I realized I can't afford to stay the
same!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I need to change. Once my debut is over, I'll
become a different me. So, that's why I... I, I'b
bleeb in melf—
choice_data_list: Slow down. You're muddying your words.
Slow down. You're muddying your words.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, I'm sorry... My heart is beating so fast...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I promise to put on a great run. Trainer, Opera O,
will you two watch me?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I'm pleased by your enthusiasm. Now go
forth, Doto!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Was that a reply or a very unique battle cry?
Either way, I have confidence in her!
